reviews.review_text: Great location, great amenities, Northern Bendigo, quiet, food truck at the front, close to shops, tourist attractions & Botanical gardens 👍

Convenient location was next to where the the girls had football tournament great place with activities for the kids. The room was smaller than expected but had everything we needed and was clean & comfy bed

Perfect Family easter! Park owners are really friendly, responsive and put on a great weekend for park goers. They set a really positive tone and experience for everyone. All amenities are clean and well kept. Food and coffee vans and a visiting icecream truck. Plenty of playgrounds, jump pillow and heated pool. All round great experience, thank you.

I called the Gold Nugget Tourist Park today seeking the most affordable option for a client who is currently homeless. I asked about cabins, tents and both powered and unpowered sites. When I mentioned tents, the staff member replied, “Oh, I thought you asked about accommodation. That’s not accommodation,” which came across as dismissive and judgemental. The interaction showed little understanding of the situation and a lack of willingness to help. Overall, the experience was unsupportive and disappointing.

Highest recommendation for all yourists both for cabins and caravan sites. We are caravanners and have returned here we like it so much! Very well maintained, friendly, helpful staff. Very clean and neat and tidy and beautiful gardens. Great pool and outdoor area for kids. And security conscious which is excellent for tourists.definitely on our list of places to stay.
Nice little holiday park

We stayed at Gold Nugget Tourist Park for the weekend of the Good Charlotte concert in Bendigo, and had a fantastic experience.

We booked one of the new two-bedroom self-contained units, which was very comfortable and had everything we needed for the weekend. The park owners also organised shuttle buses to and from the showgrounds, which made getting to the concert incredibly easy. Having a coffee van on site in the mornings was another lovely touch.

The park was full of fellow concert-goers that weekend, and when everyone returned after the show, many of us gathered outside to chat with other guests. One guest even brought out a guitar and played some live music, with everyone singing along — it created such a fun and friendly atmosphere.

A special mention to Travis, the park manager, who helped make the night really memorable while still ensuring everyone was respectful of other guests who weren’t part of the festivities.

Thank you for hosting us — we’ll definitely be back. And thanks again to Travis for helping create such a great night at the park!

The receptionist was very helpful, but the manager/ owner was extremely rude. I'm sure he deals with many people but his attitude on Tuesday was unprofessional and unwelcoming. We have a huge rig and wanted to ensure it would fit before booking in. He reacted as if we were an inconvenience. If that's how he treats his livelihood good luck to him. We found another park with a very helpful manager. We are staying a week. Customers are your bread n butter, some kindness goes a long way...

Paid a premium price for Villa over a long weekend. Arrived late Friday night only to discover we could not shower as we had no hot water. Contacted office at 8am and was told problem would be fixed. Not fixed until 1pm after another call to office staff who were rude and dismissive. Later that evening (Saturday) we arrived home to no power. 40+ degrees and no fans, air con, washing machine etc were useable. These power outages at our villa continued throughout the evening. They happened again the next evening and we received a text that stated guests should stop calling and "hindering them" as they were aware the power was out and were working on it. Problems did not resolve so we left a day early as it was too hot and unbearable in unit. Requested part refund as amenities in Villa were not available for majority of stay. They refused. Offered us a 2 night stay in an off peak season. We politely declined and requested part refund to help recover costs we had spent on takeaway food as we could no use kitchen to cook any meals we had brought with us. They have refused any money back. We have made a complaint to Consumer Affairs as we paid an enormous amount of money for a villa when we may as well have camped!|These owners are rude and we will never stay there again. We will also be lodging a complaint with Gday Parks as we purchased a Perks membership to use here and it has been a complete waste.
An excellent park. Very well run, very clean and tidy.  Thanks folks

Stayed during a booked out weekend for the Good Charlotte concert. We had a great stay, and were really impressed with the park. The bathrooms had plenty of toilets and clean showers. The customer service was excellent, with a coffee van and kebab shop on site. The park also organized shuttle buses to/from the concert. Located near a rail trail for easy rides into Bendigo.

It really is a 'gold nugget'. From the moment we arrived, the lady at reception couldn't have been friendlier. There were two families in two vans and she went out of her way to get us side by side so doors could be facing each other and with a vacant site in the middle. The park is absolutely beautiful. Spotlessly maintained. Manicured grass sites, and the amenities are immaculate. Great laundry with commercial grade washers & driers that you don't need a bank loan to use. Kids play area and swimming pool a real bonus. Will definitely stay here again. Oh, and it's priced very favourably too. As I said, a real 'Gold Nugget' in Bendigo. Thanks so much

We have stayed here many times
A 4 star park offering all you expect from a quality caravan / cabin park
Pet friendly
Close to Bendigo
Big sites and plenty of .
Enjoy
MickeyBlu Australia

This caravan park was great but the staff at night are so rude they yell at kids to get off of their scooters and then if they don’t get off the scooters they will take them away from you.

I think it is disgusting by the way the staff are speaking to children
Beautiful tourist park great facilities very clean and tidy. Staff very friendly,amenities emaculate very well looked after recommend to anyone

This is an ageing caravan park but it is clean and tidy and well located just out of town with petrol stations and a good variety of shops close by. There is a pool for cooling off in the hot weather and a laundry and lots of shade. It wasn't crowded just after the new year and we had a pleasant stay.
Very clean, extremely well maintained. Young receptionist could not have been more helpful.

A clean, friendly & well positioned caravan park in proximity to Bendigo. Only complaint was pool is definitely not the 28c claimed on the website, more like 15 so be very wary if this is the deciding factor to stay here. Other than that good value from perspective of a powered site.
Caravans this place is a must ! Priced well great for families and those who have left that behind 👏 👍 and the amenities are clean and well presented

Highly recommended! Fabulous caravan park in a quiet location and only a short drive to Bendigo central. Amenities and grounds are kept immaculate by dedicated staff. Local Epson shopping centre is only a 5 minute drive. Some sites are tight but staff are very accommodating if you have any problems and want to move.

Powered site for my motorhome. Have travelled for 3 years and this is hands down the best camp I've stayed in. Friendly and competent staff, facilities exceptionally clean and neat, close to the city. No hesitation to recommend to all travellers passing through Bendigo. Thank for making my stay amazing!
Used out van onsite

I am giving a positive review of the Gold Nugget Tourist Park Bendigo. We booked a Caravan powered site and the young lady who booked us in was so helpful, she even drove around and made sure we had the best site to suit our back door caravan. The site was spacious. The amenities were very clean and modern, the showers were very spacious. There was a good camp kitchen. We give it a score of 10 out of 10.
Really well organised. Mostly drive through sites. Amenities excellent. Loved the car numberplate recognition for the boom gates. Entry difficult to spot from the road.
This is our 2nd time staying here at Gold Nugget Caravan Park and it's fine, we've got a good site and everything's clean and tidy and the staff are very friendly and helpful.
Great staff n admenatys will be back again 👍

Had a powered site for 4 weeks. Everything  about this park is great. The staff are excellent. Facilities  modern  and spotlessly  clean. Communal fire pit. Great camp kitchen. Loved all the trees making it feel you were in the bush. Great park.
A great caravan park to stop at. Well organised, very clean and just off the main access road (but no road noise).

Great park .very neat
Service excellent
Nice size sites, good clean amenities. A little out of town, but not too far.
Lovely clean park...management very accommodating..lovely big fireplace all sat around...
Nice clean park staff very helpful
Amenities were clean and caravan sites had concrete which is not always the norm at allot of park's
Great

I travel a lot & free camping but also go into caravan parks often all over Australia.  This caravan park is the very best I have stayed at.  Everything about the park is top notch.  Clean well maintained amenities, pleasant staff, affordability.  This is where Ill be staying in the future when I am anywhere Bendigo.

I had a powered site with a ensuite and pitch my tent. The ensuite and camp kitchen and laundry are very clean. Over all the grounds were very clean. There is beautiful wild life to see around the park. Adults & children have lots to do at the park
Friendly and professional service. Thanks Debbie

Great location and handy to everything. Good office staff,capable,friendly and very helpful. Amenities the best we have come across in our travels,and spotlessly maintained. Park is well looked after. We will certainly use this park again. They are to be commended.
Golden nugget Bendigo we stayed on a powered site close to all the amenities staff were amazing helpful and very accomidating
Great park plenty of room to pull in. Great variety of things to do there. Dog friendly

We left here after a weeks stay. This would have to be the best park we have stayed in over all our years of travel. Bathrooms always spotless, grounds and garbage/recycle bins very well maintained. Good size sites & easy access to amenities block. Cannot fault this park or staff at all., Well done.
Great park. Fair rates and clean amenities

We had a powered tent site near the kitchen and ablutions. So clean and everything works! I am not a great one for pets but even though this park is super pet friendly, it is so well managed, no issues at all. Pets were all so well behaved, and guests and pets as varied as you can imagine. The jumping pillow was a highlight too.
Loved this park

I was staying in Bendigo for just one night but wanted a place I could heat a meal and have a look around at a couple of places .,visited the pottery ,art gallery, etc  . It was easy to access the city and surroundings . The Bed was comfortable shower nice and hot and staff were very helpful.
Recently stayed for a week to explore and visit friends. Very friendly staff. Very clean amenities and great communal firepit. Will be back again.

Stayed in a powered site for the Red Hot Summer Festival. The receptionist is such a lovely lady, and all the staff were brilliant. The shuttle bus was a genius move, the camp kitchen is a beauty and the facilities are awesome. Thanks guys for a brilliant weekend.
Lovely park with friendly staff. Facilities are well set out and clean. I would recommend staying here.
Had a freshly concreted hardstand for our caravan, easter weekend plenty of kids activities

A hidden gem- the website doesn’t give it justice!
We booked and we are here for Easter.
Big sites, 2 playgrounds, mini golf, bikes, heated outdoor pool under shade sails. Today they had the cfa and Easter bunny. Movie nights each night of the holidays, a disco, Easter egg hunt on Sunday. Out of town so relaxing but only a few mins drive to Aldi etc.
A nice friendly vibe here, not crazily busy and lots of kids playing. Really enjoyed it here!!!
Stayed in our caravan.  Clean facilities,  far enough away from the main road.to not hear passing traffic.
The place was clean thanks to all that care of us that stayed Nigel from melsteel
Great facilities. No unpowered tent sites. Showers are brilliant. Camp kitchen is larges and well appointed.

Called them last Saturday for a powered site as we were travelling through that day. Receptionist was rude and said we had to pay for a minimum two nights. What a rort!!
Plenty of other places to stay in the area so choose elsewhere just as we did
We loved this park,  after 5 weeks on the road, this is lovliest park we had been to. Clean amenities, lovely and tidy camp kitchen and friendly staff. We will definitely be back!!!

Initially this place was OK. Until I needed to amend an additional booking. Got hung up on 3x, was spoken to extremely rudely. Requested to speak with the manager or owner. Denied.

Would not recommend this park purely because of the ignorant and dismissive attitude of the male with whom I spoke.

Pathetic customer service by him.
Generally all good but the cabins are not up to the ‘5 star’ price charged.
Freindly great amenities
Great park. Neat and tidy.  Fantastic amenities. Friendly staff.

Awesome, family run Park with accommodation needs to suit most, great amenities, very clean park. Staff were great. We booked in for 1 night and ended up staying 3
Tip: Book Direct

Located very close to town. The facilities are enough for you to enjoy. Went there in our caravan in one of a hot day. Unfortunately the power went off from 11.00pm to 5.20am. We didnt have a shower and there was no AC in our caravan as we paid for it.  Staff went out and informed all guest as much as they can do. Toilets are clean. Cant use the microwave and the hot and cold kettle in the morning, maybe involved with the electricity went off the night before. Overall this caravan parking is good and recommended.

Powered site, This could be a great caravan park. Katie at reception was fantastic and could not do enough for us. The Managers and outdoor staff are not interested in any guests other than their family or friends. You can say hello to them, or wave as they go past at speed of 20klm and they can't even raise a hand. Along with staff on the buggys, permanent residents up the back use the gravel road along side a playground as a speedway. Just an accident waiting to happen. The amenities are reasonable, depending on who cleans them abit of hit and miss. I asked a cleaner what time does the amenities get cleaned, and she gave me this dead look and couldn't tell me, it was like I asked her to take a pay cut with the look she gave me. The pool has cameras overlooking the pool area, and is well sign posted with all the rules laid out even NO glass. But they don't look at them or abide by them as guests run, jump, bomb, drink with glass bottles. Just a Law suit waiting to happen here. The outdoor staff go around and blow the leaves and dirt off the roads, but blow the dust and leaves onto vehicles and caravans. I asked one staff member could he blow the dust and leaves over to the other side of the road where there was no sites, he said he  had to blow with the wind. I said to him that the Stihl blower could blow 10 times harder than the wind was blowing, but he just kept on blowing crap everywhere. But I will say he was consistant as he blew dirt and leaves onto other vehicles and straight into caravans that people had left their screen doors open whilst they went out for the day, so if you came back with a caravan full of dust this is why. So would I recomend this Caravan Park, Hell No, go somewhere else and be treated like a guest instead of being treated like that you shouldn't be there. These Managers and staff don't care, but don't realise that without guests they don't have a Caravan Park in these times of cost of living. There are other options in the town of Bendigo!!!
Nice clean caravan park  toilets and showers were clean and tidy.i would stay there again if in the area
Quality and comfort all here as well as space for kids and gated which is safe . Very clean site and comfortable.  A credit to the team here well done guys we will be back

Over all well maintained caravan and camping place in Epsom, not far from Bendigo city centre. Well
Maintained amenities. On gusty windy days, one may wonder whether or not those tall trees could shed some branches that could come your way. Hopefully the operators must be well aware of those potential risks. Otherwise it is a nice set up.

Stayed in one of the older cabins with ensuite.  Well priced.
Good air-conditioning.
Very clean and well maintained.  Loved the pool and barbecue area.
One of waste customer service
The cabin was a bit tired. The new air con leaked water inside the lounge room. There were two conditioners and no shampoo. The outdoor setting was very dusty.
Great park well maintained

Great park with excellent amenities that are thoroughly & fastidiously maintained. It's like a tranquil bush setting close to town, suitable for caravans, campers & anyone requiring a cabin. The staff are very helpful & friendly. Has a heated pool, play area & great camp kitchen. Supermarkets & a pub nearby. The resort is well worth a visit.

Lovely place to stay. Ablution block so clean it seemed a shame to use them. Even put on a wind and rain display, gee did it rain and wind. Friendly staff on the job straight away cleaning up the mess. As good as they come. Well done Gold Nugget.
Quiet park located out of town that welcomes dogs. Got everything you need

Booked a one night stay on a powered site, no problems at all. They texted my boomgate code  and WiFi code on my way down as I was running late due to Melbourne traffic which made it easy. Can't wait for next year.
Ambience and serenity
We enjoyed our stay and the camp kitchen was great. Bathrooms clean. We arrived late and were able to get a relatively good grassed powered site for our tent.
Well maintained park. Large sites, nice amenities ( including a bath in the ladies). Shopping centre just down the road.

Clean and comfortable with good amenities. |A great place to base ourselves for a few days and explore the area. |Lovely hosts and good facilities including a nice pool.|We were quite comfortable over the Melbourne cup weekend. |Easy access and big sites too.
Loved this park, but the trees that cause all the cotton like stuff and seed pods, needs a chainsaw put through them. We have never sneeze as much.

Spent the night in one of the nicest caravan parks I have been in. Great hospitality, the park and  its facilities are the cleanest I have ever seen. It's a lovely quiet location. Close to shops and town. It has amazing cabins for all your needs. Activities for the kids to do in the safety of the park. Would I stay again! Yes in a heart beat and would stay longer.
Great place, dog friendly, clean facilities
Needed an overnight stay good spot

Stayed for a few nights to go to a conference
It was good cabins, nice weather for pool

What a beautiful park and amazing staff so helpful , lovely place to stay just out of Bendigo on the highway , I rang up as my daughter was playing netball for two day in Bendigo, we stayed from tues til Sunday I explained they were so good they had a ensuite power site concrete area the bathroom was very clean , and big enough to put the van on , the staff was lovely to help me get the van off my car as was a bit low , but just amazing park was very clean and neat and tidy,  amenities,  laundry area, pool it was a little cold but was very clean to, even had a guy come round in his icecream truck the girls seen him as they were playing mini golf at the front so come running back to me we got a ice cream that was lovely to be back to stay again very well priced to thanks so much guys very happy customer here ,

Powered caravan site, two nights, two adults three kids: amazing. Worth every dollar, from friendly and professional customer service, to clean tidy and well planned out sites this park is one of our favourites so far and will definitely be back. Plenty to do on site (playgrounds, jumping pillow and mini golf) with kid friendly shared roads for bike riding and walks. Welcomes quality campers, and the facilities are clean, modern and very comfortable. Highly recommend for families like us, as great security and the staff are fantastic!

Great park and the lady at front counter very friendly and helpful. Park is on the Shepparton side of town and close to Aldi, woollies, chemist Bunnings etc. Park and amenities clean and tidy. Bendigo is a great place to visit. 100% recommend

Very friendly welcoming staff.|Very clean and well maintained facilities.|Plenty of dog walking nearby.|Great shared kitchen with cleaning materials, washing up etc and shared tv room.|We enjoyed our stay and will go back and spend more time

Fantastic Caravan Park,  just on outskirts of Bendigo, off of main highway, No vehicle noise though.
Park laid out beautifully  and still being added to and improved.
Dog friendly  on lead, with a dedicated dog wash area even.
The cabins all looked lovely and well laid out with little gardens gardens.
Outdoor heated pool, kids play areas with jumping baloons.
Newish huge shopping centre just up the road all very convenient.

Just stayed the one night.
Clear instructions to get to our drive-through site and nice and clean amenities.
Will use again.

Great, Caravan Park, clean and well maintained amenities.
Camp kitchen great setup.
Drive through sites. 👍
Friendly helpful, happy staff.
Thank you.

Great park. It's our place to stay whenever we go to Bendigo.
Lovely green sites  clean amenities.
Friendly staff and mangers.
I loved it lots of activities it had a pool mini golf tennis court jumping pillow and 2 parks overall it was just great.

Stayed in a powered site with our camping trailer. The camp kitchen is great. The amenities block is great. The showers were the best and even the WiFi was great.
$50+ is justified
Great facilities

Bit far out of town but quiet
Popular place so hard to get in
Great facilities and very clean park
Tussenstop op weg naar Echuca, goede uitvalsbasis om Bendigo te verkennen.

We spent 5 days at the park with members of our caravan group.  In total there were 69 vans.  The facilities were very clean and grounds were well looked after. They have a very well set up family bathroom/toilet that is accessible to people with a disability who can navigate one small step.  Linda and her staff were very helpful and friendly.  Another bonus for this park is the large on-site function centre that we were able to use on the hot days during our stay. As a large group of us were staying at the park, we were offered and most of the group took up, the option for a catered dinner on the Saturday night at a very reasonable additional cost.  People with pets wishing to attend the dinner were catered for with tables being placed outside for people to eat at.
Tidy and quiet. Good location. Our ensuite was tidy and clean and maintained. The park amenities were fine. Plenty of activity as it seems like a popular park.

Great place  friendly staff and obliging
Street signs only read one way which is frustrating.
Pet friendly but burrs on field and around van.
Close to major shopping centre and fuel

Ein toller Campingplatz!
44 Dollar mit Strom.
Eine der saubersten Küchen und Bäder die ich auf meiner Reise erlebt habe! Absolut gepflegter Platz und nette Leute.
Nachts ist es ruhig und man kann gut schlafen.
Und das wichtigste: das wlan hat so gut funktioniert.
Was will man mehr!!!
Ich würde jederzeit wiederkommen!
Central Park to Bendigo just follow the main drag into town. Clean amenities tidy park and one of the giday group. Just down the road to Bunnings and lots of other shops

The manager Collin and all the staff were so friendly and helpful. The showers were roomy, and the newly renovated amenities block was spotlessly clean. The park and grounds were well kept and quiet, and despite being close to the highway, we had no road noise. Laundry facilities were excellent and very affordable. We will definitely be back!
Friendly staff accommodated our late arrival. Suitable powered site close to great ammenities. Booking and check in etc were simple. Thank you.
We were here when the hail storm hit and was so grateful for their kindness, understanding and offers of assistance. Thank you 😊 we will be back

Disappointed to be leaving a poor review for a caravan park that has such amazing facilities. We visited with friends who had made our group booking months prior. Bookings were for a mixture of caravan sites & cabins. We’ve never encountered such repeatedly rude staff as we did on this occasion. Staff were unwilling to honour quoted rates, and pushy at insisting that some members of our group had to pay more than they had been quoted at time of booking. It seems they had quoted without recognising it was a peak weekend in town (Leisurefest). One staff member was verbally aggressive and yelling at one of our group who are older and very respectful. One of our group said to staff that they would not be staying again (after being forced to pay more) and were met with a comment along the lines of that’s your problem. On leaving, we tried to explain our experience to give feedback. The staff member responded in clipped tones and was clearly disinterested in anything we had to say.
After leaving, we forwarded a complaint via G’day Parks and despite multiple attempts and responses from G’day Parks who passed our concerns on, the managers of Gold Nugget have not responded to us some 6 weeks later.
We are seasoned travellers and gobsmacked by the repeated rudeness we experienced here. Pretty shameful.
Very nice, people friendly, great facilities.
Great park.We have stayed here before and will be back again.Facilities are great.We recommend highly.

A fantastic caravan park but I must admit the cabins looked a good size from the outside. I was with my own caravan and the owners were very helpful and cheerful. Everywhere was nice and clean and well maintained. The toilet block was big enough, clean and lovely hot showers. Unfortunately triple J was piped into the toilet block but that could be just to stop people staying too long in shower or toilet.
When they said they had wifi I thought it would be useless like most hotel wifi even but it worked perfectly for me. I wasn't near the main building even so I was amazed. 9mb sec when tested it so fine for most things. I really can't fault this park apart from the triple J music lol.
Fantastic park, very clean, very welcoming park

We just had 7 nights at this park in our van.It was one of the best parks we have been in. Ease of booking, no problem to add an extra night on when our circumstances changed.  The park is very clean & well maintained & van sites are easy to access.  Even with a lot of kids visiting, it was very quiet & relaxing.  Great amenities with hot showers with good pressure. Staff are all friendly & accommodating.
It's location makes for easy access to town, shopping centres & day tripping to other towns.  We would definitely stay here again.  Great value for money!

We had a powered site for a few nights and the park was lovely.   Amenities so clean and spacious.  Piping hot hot water with amazing pressure in the showers.  Camp kitchen well equipped. Beautiful place to set up camp.
Great sites for your van staff are very friendly and helpful the sites are very flat and the amenities are excellent and the park is pet friendly
Good size van sites with all your needs catered ,even kids aRe caTed for

A great park at a reasonable price nice and close to all the shops very clean and tidy management can not to enough for you very nice to see we stayed for 4 weeks and the amenities were cleaned every day lovely cleaners can’t say enough about this park recommend anybody check it out .
Good tourist park. Good facilities, great staff.

We loved this caravan park, we stayed there for 10 nights, myself and my husband had a powered site a friend had another powered site our son had a deluxe cabin.  The sites had plenty of room and the cabin was clean and tidy.  The camp kitchen was great, we all meet there and cooked and eat in there most days.  The amenities were fantastic, clean and tidy always, the showers are great, nice hot water. This park was always clean and tidy.  They have playground, large bouncing pillow, heated pool, tennis court, basketball and putt putt, we played putt putt most days.  The staff are amazing, I would recommend this park to anyone.

Sub-par, poor/rude service from the staff who seem to act like they’re doing the biggest favour to you by allowing you to be a paying customer.
Regret giving them money.
Dog Friendly!!! Even has a dog bath.
Fantastic well kept park.

Nice caravan park.
Nice and clean ensuite.
We spent two nights and it was great.

Stayed last night in our caravan on a powered site. There was an open sewer pipe on the annex mat that was just outside our caravan door. After dark the pipe overflowed raw sewage and toilet paper all over the annex mat. I rang the office and no answer. Recording said ring emergency number on site map but was not even given that. Spoke to maintenance guy this am and he told me manager would ring me . Said we should have moved to another site last night but  who would step out of your van in the dark on to raw sewage. I will NEVER stay here again as I feel my complaint was not followed through .

I pitched my tent on a powered site for 5 nights. I can't say I made the most of the site, as I was out and about all day and came back only to sleep and shower, then leave again. I had a hot shower every morning in a clean amenities block. All my neighbours were quiet, and  hope I was too. Top spot to pitch a tent. many thanx for a good stay.

Nice park, friendly staff. Grounds well maintained.
Lots for kids to do, but mini Golf needs resurfacing
A little out of Bendigo but well situated for the pottery and talking tram which can take you into the city if you wish. Great amenities and is pet friendly with a dog wash.
